code: export class HaircutStylesOfferParser{constructor(){this._offerId=0;this._stylistId=0;this._stylistName='';this._price=0;this._baseFigure='';}flush(){this._offerId=0;this._stylistId=0;this._stylistName='';this._price=0;this._baseFigure='';return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._offerId=wrapper.readInt();this._stylistId=wrapper.readInt();this._stylistName=wrapper.readString()||'';this._price=wrapper.readInt();this._baseFigure=wrapper.readString()||'';return true;}get offerId(){return this._offerId;}get stylistId(){return this._stylistId;}get stylistName(){return this._stylistName;}get price(){return this._price;}get baseFigure(){return this._baseFigure;}}
